pi_items.source: UniProt P68871 REST API and local dataset extraction
Manual E7V mutation calculation based on task instructions

privileged_info_summary: The human HBB Wild-Type (WT) sequence is a 147-amino acid chain from real UniProt P68871 data, starting with 'MVHLTPEEKS'. The expected Sickle Cell mutant sequence correctly introduces an E7V mutation, altering the 7th position to Valine and resulting in the sequence starting 'MVHLTPVEKS'. Analysis confirms that the WT variant has a molecular weight (MW) of approximately 16.0 kDa (15,998 Da) and an isoelectric point (pI) of ~6.74, while the Sickle variant has an MW of approximately 16.0 kDa (15,968 Da) and a pI of ~7.13. Because the Sickle variant loses a negatively charged Glutamate, it has a higher (more basic) pI. Consequently, at alkaline pH (e.g., pH 8.6), the Wild-Type variant is more negatively charged and migrates faster toward the positive electrode (anode) during gel electrophoresis.
